title: cryptantha pterocarya var. pterocarya
intro: Cryptantha pterocarya var. pterocarya, also known as white top or white top cryptantha, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of white top include relief from sore throats, coughs, and skin irritations, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions.
